text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Grass Wonder officially begins her quest
through the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eager to discuss what lies ahead, I head to her
classroom so I can walk her to the office myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... Spe? That kanji character isn't quite
right.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-which one?! Where?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(Looks like she's talking to Special Week—an
Umamusume from Hokkaido who's in the same
year as her.)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, hold on. First, let's try and chill for a
second. I can't see the paper with your hands in
the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(And that's Seiun Sky, who is also making her
debut soon. Her manner of communication can be
a tad indirect at times.)

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You have the wrong radical on the left side of
"whirlpool." The one you've written makes the
kanji for "disaster."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um, um, um... So, I need to do it like... this?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What chicken scratch is that, Spe?! I've seen
better handwritin' from a six year old!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Meanie!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Dear me. If even El is correcting your
penmanship, I fear you may have a long way to
go...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(Another classmate in the same year, El Condor
Pasa is an Umamusume with a big and bright
personality. She also shares a room with Grass
Wonder.)

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Spe, there's plenty of time. Just take
a few deep breaths and correct the mistake.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! I didn't realize you were here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! You're Grass's trainer! Is she late for
training?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I'm so sorry! It's all my faaault!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... You see... I scored so bad on our quiz that
I have to do extra homework!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She's not allowed to train until it gets done,
either.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However, with our debuts coming up, she can't
afford to miss a single session.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Exactamente! So, less tears and more writing,
Spe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Spirit! Guts! Effooort!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: A little effort before the test would've been nice too, though.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I know, I knooow!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Well, that is the situation, Trainer.
Would you mind waiting a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Now, let's continue, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Haste makes waste. This is the perfect
opportunity to refocus and learn from your
mistake.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Think about what a whirlpool is made of. Water,
right? So the correct kanji should have the
"water" radical.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-oh! That makes sense! I can remember that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder skillfully gives concise but useful
advice to help Special Week finish her extra
homework.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you for waiting, Trainer.
choice_data_list: You all seem like good friends.
You all seem like good friends.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I really value our friendship. Each of them
is quite different, which makes our time together
enjoyable.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Though of course, that isn't all...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As members of the same generation, we are
bound to face one another many times on the
track as rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her expression remains calm as she says this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But something about her aura makes my skin
prickle ever so slightly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now, you wanted to discuss our plans from here
on, right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I know we need to talk about things like training
and our race agenda.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But I have something to give you first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Grass Wonder holds out a piece of
calligraphy paper.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I unfold it and see confident, bold lines that spell
out...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Determination.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I will follow the path I have chosen, never backing
down, until I reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: This... is my promise in writing.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Would you carry it with you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just a folded piece of paper, but it's as if I can
feel the weight of the conviction she's poured
into it. I carefully tuck it away.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll be counting on you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let's begin the ascent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, our journey is underway. Debut
race, here we come!
